heading: Grant Database Access to AWS IAM Roles
body:
To grant database access to the AWS (Amazon Web Services) IAM (Identity and Access Management) role, complete the steps
described in the [Configure Database Users](mongodb-users) section for AWS (Amazon Web Services) IAM (Identity and Access Management). For
more information on granting database access using Atlas CLI,
Atlas Administration API, or Atlas UI, see [Configure Database Users](add-mongodb-users).
